description: Inventory of canonical proof lanes, AGENTS.md validation commands, and focused validation lanes with explicit cargo graph boundary expectations.

lanes.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_default_tokio_tree cargo tree -e normal -p asupersync -i tokio
lanes.intended_guarantee: Default production normal dependency graph has no tokio edge.

lanes.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_metrics_tokio_tree cargo tree -e normal -p asupersync --features metrics -i tokio
lanes.intended_guarantee: Optional metrics production normal dependency graph has no tokio edge.

lanes.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_fuzz_tokio_tree cargo tree -e normal -p asupersync --features fuzz -i tokio

lanes.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_workspace_tokio_tree cargo tree -e normal --workspace -i tokio

lanes.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_full_tokio_tree cargo tree -e features --workspace --invert tokio

lanes.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_native_feature_smoke CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo check -p asupersync --no-default-features --features tls,sqlite,postgres,mysql,quic,http3,compression,tracing-integration

lanes.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_fuzz_manifest_smoke CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo check --manifest-path fuzz/Cargo.toml

known_regressions_or_blockers.summary: Focused cfg(test) channel proof attempts repeatedly reached the asupersync-conformance compile tail and then went RCH progress-stale with fresh hook heartbeats.
evidence: RCH builds 29880940465487998 and 29880940465487999 cancelled cleanly after stale progress
known_regressions_or_blockers.vf2_follow_up: Decide whether conformance is intentional for these focused lanes. If not, quarantine the graph so focused channel checks do not compile unrelated conformance surfaces.

known_regressions_or_blockers.summary: Forcing RUSTFLAGS='--cfg test' globally is invalid because third-party crates activate test-only imports without their dev-dependencies.
evidence: RCH build 29880940465488002 failed in const-oid and rustc_version test-only imports
known_regressions_or_blockers.vf2_follow_up: Do not use global --cfg test as a focused compile workaround. Split targets or feature gates instead.
